parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const c = $('10_Claim_Contact').item.json.body[0]; const handles = [c.phone, c.messenger_handle].filter(Boolean).map(h => '"' + h + '"').join(','); return $env.SUPABASE_URL + '/rest/v1/inbound_messages?select=body,from_address,direction,created_at&partner_id=eq.' + c.partner_id + '&from_address=in.(' + handles + ')&order=created_at.desc&limit=10' })() }}

={{ (() => { const c = $('10_Claim_Contact').item.json.body[0]; const handles = [c.phone, c.messenger_handle].filter(Boolean).map(h => '"' + h + '"').join(','); return $env.SUPABASE_URL + '/rest/v1/outbound_messages?select=body,to_address,status,created_at&partner_id=eq.' + c.partner_id + '&to_address=in.(' + handles + ')&order=created_at.desc&limit=10' })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ partner_id: $json.partner_id, channel: ($json.contact_messenger === 'telegram' ? 'telegram' : ($json.contact_messenger === 'whatsapp' ? 'whatsapp' : 'other')), to_address: ($json.contact_handle || $json.contact_phone || ''), body: $json.ai_reply.text, status: 'dry_run' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ ai_state: $('60_Parse_AI_JSON').item.json.ai_reply.next_state, do_not_contact: ($('60_Parse_AI_JSON').item.json.ai_reply.intent === 'stop') ? true : undefined, last_outbound_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ (() => { const u = $('60_Parse_AI_JSON').item.json.ai_usage || {}; const pt = u.prompt_tokens || 0; const ct = u.completion_tokens || 0; const cost = (pt * 0.00000015) + (ct * 0.00000060); return JSON.stringify({ status: 'succeeded', input: { contact_id: $('60_Parse_AI_JSON').item.json.contact_id, partner_id: $('60_Parse_AI_JSON').item.json.partner_id, state: $('60_Parse_AI_JSON').item.json.current_state, model: 'gpt-4.1-mini' }, output: { prompt_tokens: pt, completion_tokens: ct, total_tokens: u.total_tokens || (pt + ct), cost_usd: Number(cost.toFixed(6)), next_state: $('60_Parse_AI_JSON').item.json.ai_reply.next_state, intent: $('60_Parse_AI_JSON').item.json.ai_reply.intent, escalated: !!$('60_Parse_AI_JSON').item.json.ai_reply.escalate } }) })() }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ partner_id: $('60_Parse_AI_JSON').item.json.partner_id, actor: 'ai', event: 'ai_conversation_failed', payload: { contact_id: $('60_Parse_AI_JSON').item.json.contact_id, error: $('60_Parse_AI_JSON').item.json.ai_error, raw: $('60_Parse_AI_JSON').item.json.ai_raw || null, state: $('60_Parse_AI_JSON').item.json.current_state } }) }}
